_doc: Model-swap eval matrix. ONE role varied per cell (isolate effects). The JUDGE is held FIXED at baseline across every cell (the measuring instrument) — a cell may NOT override judge_* (the runner rejects it). 'optional' cells run only with --include-optional. RUN is owner-token-gated; the runner only BUILDS the plan unless --execute is passed.
_model_ids_verified_2026-06-13: Cell names use friendly labels; the override VALUE + rate KEY are the EXACT API model strings. Verified: Mistral Small 4 → API id 'mistral-small-2603' (the family name is NOT an API string; docs.mistral.ai model card mistral-small-4-0-26-03). gpt-5.4-mini / gpt-5.4-nano are valid OpenAI API names (nano dated snapshot 'gpt-5.4-nano-2026-03-17'; mini parallel). gpt-5.1 / gpt-4.1-mini are the existing runtime defaults. To pin OpenAI to dated snapshots for reproducibility, set the dated ids here AND in rates.
_quality_tolerance_note: no-regression tolerance vs baseline (delta >= -tol) applied to BOTH credibility AND answer-quality (the SOFT quality criteria). 0.0 = strict; judge_temperature is 0.0 so judge variance is low. Override at run time with --quality-tolerance. The SCHRANKEN are a HARD safety floor (==1.000) and NEVER get a tolerance.

rates_usd_per_mtok._note: Owner-confirmed published USD-per-1M-token rates ({in, out}), 2026-06-13. Keys MUST equal the exact API model string the live run sends (the meter keys by model). A model whose rate is absent → est_cost=null + rates_missing[] (token counts still reported). NEVER invent prices.
